## `wake_up_process()` 直接呼叫點清單(kernel/ 子樹,共 **47** 處)

| # | 呼叫函式 | 檔案:行號 |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `__cpuhp_kick_ap` | kernel/cpu.c:755 |
| 2 | `audit_schedule_prune` | kernel/audit_tree.c:965 |
| 3 | `free_pid` | kernel/pid.c:146 |
| 4 | `__exit_signal` | kernel/exit.c:170 |
| 5 | `rcuwait_wake_up` | kernel/exit.c:311 |
| 6 | `exit_notify` | kernel/exit.c:760 |

| 22 | `_torture_create_kthread` | kernel/torture.c:954 |
| 23 | `trace_selftest_startup_wakeup` | kernel/trace/trace_selftest.c:1238 |
| 24 | `start_single_kthread` | kernel/trace/trace_hwlat.c:452 |
| 25 | `timerlat_irq` | kernel/trace/trace_osnoise.c:1813 |
| 26 | `timerlat_irq` | kernel/trace/trace_osnoise.c:1819 |
| 27 | `wake_up_and_wait_for_irq_thread_ready` | kernel/irq/manage.c:1286 |
| 28 | `ring_buffer_producer` | kernel/trace/ring_buffer_benchmark.c:268 |
| 29 | `ring_buffer_producer` | kernel/trace/ring_buffer_benchmark.c:293 |
| 30 | `ring_buffer_producer_thread` | kernel/trace/ring_buffer_benchmark.c:407 |
| 31 | `__irq_wake_thread` | kernel/irq/handle.c:136 |
| 32 | `__up` | kernel/locking/semaphore.c:278 |

| 34 | `sugov_kthread_create` | kernel/sched/cpufreq_schedutil.c:625 |
| 35 | `percpu_rwsem_wake_function` | kernel/locking/percpu-rwsem.c:135 |
| 36 | `process_timeout` | kernel/time/timer.c:2094 |
| 37 | `cpu_timer_fire` | kernel/time/posix-cpu-timers.c:597 |
| 38 | `alarmtimer_nsleep_wakeup` | kernel/time/alarmtimer.c:758 |
| 39 | `rcu_wake_cond` | kernel/rcu/tree.c:2430 |
| 40 | `rcu_spawn_gp_kthread` | kernel/rcu/tree.c:4658 |
| 41 | `psi_trigger_create` | kernel/sched/psi.c:1358 |
| 42 | `do_map_benchmark` | kernel/dma/map_benchmark.c:137 |
| 43 | `cgroup_freeze_task` | kernel/cgroup/freezer.c:168 |

| 45 | `__cpu_map_entry_alloc` | kernel/bpf/cpumap.c:439 |
| 46 | `cpu_map_generic_redirect` | kernel/bpf/cpumap.c:748 |
| 47 | `__cpu_map_flush` | kernel/bpf/cpumap.c:763 |

**方法**:cbm `trace_path` 給出的入邊只精確到「檔案」層級(此 C 專案的 CALLS 邊掛在檔案節點),所以用它鎖定候選檔案清單後,對 kernel/ 子樹下這些檔案做 `grep -rn "wake_up_process"`,共 62 個原始匹配,再逐一排除:
- 定義本身 `int wake_up_process(struct task_struct *p)`(kernel/sched/core.c:4476)
- `EXPORT_SYMBOL(wake_up_process)`(kernel/sched/core.c:4480,非呼叫)
- 15 處出現在註解中的 `wake_up_process()`(kthread.c ×4、trace_selftest.c ×1、timer.c ×1、sched/core.c ×4、hrtimer.c ×2、bpf/cpumap.c ×1)

剩餘 47 個真正呼叫點,再用 `ctags -x --c-kinds=f` 建立每個檔案的函式起始行索引,取每個呼叫行前最近的函式起點作為外層呼叫函式,並對幾個間距較大的案例(irq/handle.c、sched/psi.c、trace_osnoise.c)手動核對區間內無其他函式定義,確認對應正確。

**總數:47 個直接呼叫點**(不含定義、`EXPORT_SYMBOL`、註解及其他 `wake_up_*` 變體)。
